llm_summary.summary: Pedro Cao Eiriz is a male individual residing at Passeig Maragall 13, Entresuelo 1, 08026 Barcelona, ES. His confirmed contact identifiers are phone +34617758559 and email pedrocaoeiriz@gmail.com. The email is linked to a Google account (Gaia ID 109807121807838897737) under the name Pedro Cao, a GitHub account, a Twitter account, a Microsoft account, an Adobe account, a KuCoin account, and an 8fit account. The phone number is registered on iCloud and Uber. His email appeared in two data breaches (Taringa, 2017; 8fit, 2018), with exposed data including email addresses, usernames, passwords, names, genders, geographic locations, and IP addresses; one password was exposed as a weak hash. His Google Maps activity shows Local Guides level 2 status with 1 review and 2 photos, including a 5-star review of Restaurante Cambalache in what appears to be a Spanish-speaking context, and a photo upload associated with Itnig Café. No employment, employer, or professional registry records were confirmed. Debt amount, debt origin, debt age, call history, and legal asset findings are all unknown for this case.

breaches_details.details: 8fit, a popular fitness and health app, experienced a data breach. The breach occurred in early 2021, with the database made public later in June. The leaked data included email addresses and usernames, along with salted MD5 password hashes.

Data breach that occurred at Taringa, a Latin American social network in 2018. The data breach was the result of a hacking incident in which the personal information of over 28 million users was exposed. The data that was compromised included email addresses, hashed passwords, and personal information such as names, birth dates, and location data.
